envelope.subject: Raise a Glass to Perfect Events! 🍹

subject: Raise a Glass to Perfect Events! 🍹
body_text:
Pro bartenders & craft cocktails for your event.

![Comeketo Catering Logo](https://comeketocatering.com/wp-
content/uploads/2025/01/LOGO_WEB.png)

![Bar Service](https://comeketocatering.com/wp-
content/uploads/2025/06/Header_Bar_Compressed.jpg)

# Complete Your Celebration with Professional Bar Service 🍹

Did you know that Comeketo offers full-service bar packages? While we're
famous for our authentic Brazilian cuisine, we're equally passionate about
crafting the perfect beverage experience for your guests. Our professional bar
service takes the stress out of drink planning, allowing you to focus on what
matters most – celebrating with your loved ones.

## Our Bar Service Options

💰

### Cash Bar Service

Perfect for corporate events and casual gatherings, our cash bar option
provides professional bartenders and premium beverage selections while guests
purchase their own drinks.

🎉

### Open Bar Packages

MOST POPULAR

Transform your event into an unforgettable celebration with our full open bar
service. Choose from our curated selection of premium spirits, craft
cocktails, wines, and beers – all included in one convenient package.

🍸

### Specialty Cocktail Experiences

Elevate your event with signature cocktails crafted specifically for your
celebration. Our expert mixologists can create multiple custom drinks that
reflect your event's theme or personal preferences.

🍷

### Wine & Beer Packages

For a more refined approach, our wine and beer packages feature carefully
selected varietals and craft brews that perfectly complement our Brazilian
cuisine.

### Ready to Add Bar Service to Your Event? 🥂

Explore all our bar service packages at comeketocatering.com or speak with
your catering consultant about adding beverages to your event.

[comeketocatering.com](https://comeketocatering.com)

#### Comeketo Catering

199 Main Street  
Fitchburg, MA

This is an unmonitored inbox, for help, questions, or more details, please
contact your catering consultant

[Unsubscribe](%unsubscribe_url%)

  

  
  
  
  
\-----  
Regards,  

**Domenic Dawson**  
 _​ ​_Catering Sales Director  

📲 C: [(978) 235-3791](tel:19782353791)

📲 W: [(978) 381-1212](tel:9783811212)
